raw:
{

"judge_id": "Judge_2023_10",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 3,
    "R1.7": 3,
    "RX.1": 4,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 3
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent softened the 'first' claim but did not map against multiple prior works or clearly identify sharp vs rhetorical deltas beyond this single adjustment.",
    "R1.7": "The agent flagged one missing citation regarding the 'first' claim but did not audit all load-bearing citations comprehensively.",
    "RX.1": "The agent explicitly listed caveats and limitations, showing good uncertainty disclosure but not comprehensively for every recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "The output stayed within the requested scope without drifting, removing unsupported claims and adding relevant limitations.",
    "RX.4": "The agent avoided introducing errors and addressed potential harms like overclaiming, with no regressions mentioned.",
    "RX.5": "The agent made several changes but did not annotate each edit with sources or reasons, only tracing major rewrites."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.7,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.6
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent softened the 'first' claim but did not map against multiple prior works or clearly identify sharp vs rhetorical deltas beyond this single adjustment.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flagged one missing citation regarding the 'first' claim but did not audit all load-bearing citations comprehensively.
rationale.RX.1: The agent explicitly listed caveats and limitations, showing good uncertainty disclosure but not comprehensively for every recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output stayed within the requested scope without drifting, removing unsupported claims and adding relevant limitations.
rationale.RX.4: The agent avoided introducing errors and addressed potential harms like overclaiming, with no regressions mentioned.
rationale.RX.5: The agent made several changes but did not annotate each edit with sources or reasons, only tracing major rewrites.
